
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{"products":[{"__typename":"Consultancy"},{"__typename":"Cosmo"},{"__typename":"SDK"}]},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"isLeadAvailable":false,"lead":{"id":1}},"path":["products",0]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":null,"path":["products",0,"lead"],"errors":[{"message":"Enum \"Mood\" cannot represent value: \"\"","path":["products",0,"lead","derivedMood"],"extensions":{"code":"INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR"}}]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
